hypothesis: recent campaign failures are caused by dead sessions being treated as valid
action: ran production /sessions/{profile}/test on sampled failure cluster and healthy controls
expected_signal: failure-cluster profiles classify as logged_out/checkpoint/video_selfie while recent winners classify healthy
result: confirmed: jamika mager logged_out, elizabeth cruz video_selfie, shalon southwell checkpoint, neda bahe video_selfie, serafina crossett checkpoint; ria borland, wanda lobb, adele compton, catalina morrow, francene filson healthy
decision: ship auth-health gating and exclude blocked states from candidate selection

hypothesis: retry-all is falsely classifying non-step-1 visibility errors as dead-post evidence
action: inspected production history for 85ee0d53 and compared emitted retry errors with retry-all dead-post heuristic in backend/main.py
expected_signal: step-4 typed-text failures should not produce early termination or post-url-dead markers
result: confirmed: production history for 85ee0d53 showed repeated step-4 typed-text failures immediately followed by early termination and post-url-dead rows because retry-all counted any error containing 'not visible'
decision: restrict dead-post evidence to exact step-1 post-not-visible failures and add a regression test

hypothesis: once dead sessions and false dead-post inference are removed, some campaigns should recover to 100% without duplicates
action: replayed recent exhausted campaigns on production after shipping auth-health and retry-all verifier fixes, then inspected queue history
expected_signal: at least one previously exhausted campaign reaches full success and no duplicate successful profile assignment appears in its results
result: confirmed: d30e8a3f progressed from 8/18 to 18/18 and 2926e310 progressed from 15/19 to 19/19 on production
decision: keep replaying with the corrected selection path and use the same campaigns as proof targets for duplicate-control verification

hypothesis: the remaining empty-composer failures come from facebook textarea variants where playwright fill/type do not trigger composer text state
action: added a textarea native-setter fallback in comment_bot and a unit test that reproduces the exact sequence: textarea resolved, fill fails local proof, type fails local proof, native setter succeeds
expected_signal: local regression test proves the new fallback is used before keyboard fallback and compile plus queue/session tests stay green
result: confirmed locally: test_campaign_session_health plus test_queue_drafts_recovery passed 19/19 and py_compile passed after adding textarea.native_setter coverage
decision: commit and deploy this surgical input fix, then re-run the two proof campaigns on production
